posts.title: The Strait Is the Mandate
posts.subtitle: A 21-mile waterway in the Persian Gulf holds the lever the Fed doesn't. American gasoline rose 37% in five weeks. The FOMC is downstream.

posts.title: Minnesota Isn't Here for the Injunction
posts.subtitle: My original read on the Menendez denial missed where the real action is. The case lives in evidence-gathering — a different game with a longer timeline.

posts.title: 3,000 Arrests, 335 Names, One Court Order
posts.subtitle: DHS claims 3,000+ Metro Surge arrests. Its own registry names 11% of them. No public record of the agents. A federal judge changed that on May 1.

posts.title: Atlanta Passed a Sanctuary Resolution. The Vendor Contract Didn't.
posts.subtitle: APD's own open-records audit documents 15 immigration-tagged searches in 2025. The city passed two new anti-ICE resolutions last week. Neither one mentions Flock.

posts.title: Independent Inside of Government
posts.subtitle: Kevin Warsh didn't reject Fed independence at his hearing. He redefined the word — and the Senate vote lands the same morning as the FOMC.
